name: Shinobi Swarm
description: Survive growing waves of enemies while collecting XP to evolve your abilities. Face powerful bosses at the end of each level and unlock new characters and permanent upgrades with the coins you earn.
instructions: Keyboard Movement WASD or Arrow Keys Pause ESC Gamepad Movement D-Pad or Left Analog Pause Start Menu Mobile Virtual joystick on screen Multiplayer Player 1 Keyboard or Gamepad 1
